text: Welcome, newbie_kim! You're all set as a community member. Say hi in #introductions and have a look at the community guidelines.
Great to have you here, mentor_lina! You've been added as a mentor. Please review the mentor expectations in #mentors-hub before taking on mentees.
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! We've added you as a moderator. Please review the mod guidelines in #staff-resources.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You're set up as an event helper. Check out the events handbook in #events-team to get started.
